title: Mothers Day Gifts, Gifts for Mum, Mothers Day Acrylic Heart Hanging Plaque, Best Mum Gifts, Mothers Day Decorations, Happy Mothers Day Heart Shape Hanging Sign for Home Decor
features: 【Mothers Day Hanging Ornament】You will receive 1 x mothers day hanging ornament, the size is about 8 x 8 x 0.6cm. This beautiful mothers day decoration is the best mothers day gift for mum from son and daughter.
【High Quality Material】The Mothers Day gift is made of high quality acrylic material, reliable quality, clear pattern, delicate and beautiful, not easy to fade and durable.

【Classic Mothers Day Elements】The Happy Mothers Day charm is heart shaped and printed with brightly coloured flowers, vivid butterfly patterns and simple and generous ‘Happy Mothers Day’ characters, which can visually express your love for your mum.

【Easy to Use】The mothers day hanging sign comes with a white lanyard, easy to hang on table vases, car mirrors, wind chimes, wine bottles, doors, windows, walls, bags or anywhere else you want to decorate.
【Versatile Use】The mothers day decoration is perfect for hanging on gift boxes, adding an elegant look to your gift boxes. Also it is a very warm gift for your mum, grandma, nanny, grandma.
